# Task: <title>

## Summary
Short description of the task.

## Problem
Why this work is needed.

## Scope
What should be done.

## Non-goals
What should NOT be done in this task.

## Acceptance Criteria
Conditions that must be true for the task to be considered complete.

## Technical Notes
Implementation hints or architectural constraints.

## Verification
Steps to verify the implementation.

Example:
- dotnet build
- run API
- test endpoint

## Documentation Updates
Which docs must be updated if the task affects documentation.
